name: HBFA-FL EDK2 Development
postCreateCommand: git submodule update --init --recursive && chmod +x HBFA/UefiHostTestTools/Run*.py HBFA/UefiHostTestTools/Report/ReportMain.py HBFA/UefiHostTestTools/Report/GenCodeCoverage.py 2>/dev/null || true && (grep -q 'source ~/init_hbfa_env.sh' ~/.bashrc || echo 'source ~/init_hbfa_env.sh' >> ~/.bashrc)
